calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 competence bootstrap-explorer validation (post-build retest): composed RND drive + credit-replay + developmental anneal + budget, OFF (RND plateau) vs ON x {z_world,raw}; does the composition lift floor->competent past the 5.22 plateau (target ~13.05, toward BC 32.72)?
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC substrate-readiness validation (Step-8 of /implement-substrate for mech457_competence_bootstrap_explorer, IMPLEMENTED ree-v3 main 022a284 2026-07-16). experiment_purpose=diagnostic -> excluded from governance scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: >=2 non_contributory MECH-457 autopsies (751-750, 752-753-754, 755, 746c-756) but the named upstream substrate is now BUILT and this is a DISTINCT COMPOSED mechanism (new EXQ NUMBER, not a single-axis bolt-on). GOV-REUSE-1: composed-bootstrap ON foraging vs the 5.22 plateau on both reps recorded in NO prior manifest (751 RND-only; 752-756 converters on sparse base) -> run. OFF/ON minted reuse-eligible per rep (include_driver_script_in_hash=False; for the V3-EXQ-750 INV-088 matched-competent retest). ethics all-false/allow. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 candidate/pending_substrate_reconfirmation. Heavy: z_world cotrain ON=3000ep x 3 seeds; cloud.

items.title: MECH-232 DA-modulated representational expansion (SD-024 validation): DA-ON vs DA-OFF benefit terrain; leg-1 representational expansion at reward locations (density/resolution/stability); leg-2 CRUX approach-without-explicit-gradient (weight-independent density-following persists when all benefit weights are zeroed while the value-follower collapses to chance).
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic; excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring; a PASS routes through /failure-autopsy adjudication before promoting MECH-232 candidate->provisional, a FAIL refutes). Step-8 of /implement-substrate for SD-024 (hippocampal_module.da_modulated_rbf_density), IMPLEMENTED ree-v3 main 2026-07-16. Substrate readiness: SD-024 IMPLEMENTED, SD-004 IMPLEMENTED, ARC-007 active -- buildable. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readouts (DA-driven density expansion + weight-independent density-following approach) exist in NO prior manifest (SD-024 did not exist until today) -> not recoverable -> run. Re-derive brake: 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies tag MECH-232 -> not braked. Ethics all-false/allow (benefit/reward side; no self-model, no negative valence). Leg-1 acceptance L1a density_expansion_ratio>=1.5 (LOAD-BEARING); leg-2 L2a density_approach>=0.60 + L2b above-chance + L2c approach-without-gradient (weights zeroed: density approach persists AND value-follower at chance) -- ALL LOAD-BEARING. P0 readiness (same statistic the criteria route on): R1 density read discriminates >=0.5, R2 walker reaches positive-control >=0.80; below-floor self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Inline 8-seed Mac validation PASS/supports (expansion ~2.40, approach_on 0.96-1.00, dens_zeroed 0.92-1.00, val_zeroed 0.00, all readiness met); manifest REMOVED from evidence/ (cloud authoritative). OFF arm minted reuse-eligible (include_driver_script_in_hash=False). Deterministic synthetic (non-parametric RBF; no training/encoder head; phased training N/A). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; dry-run sentinel written. NOTE for governance: substrate_queue.json SD-024 depends_on_unresolved should drop SD-004 (implemented) + MECH-232 (the claim this validates).
